name: My Eyes Are Full of You
overview: Jiang Lili, the "loser" was forced to pretend to be her twin sister because of an accident. After experiencing the extreme contrast between the life of a top-notch producer, she strives to become a better version of herself.

trailers.title: 【Premiere On Jan 10】Official Trailer: Nothing But You | 眼里余光都是你 |Wang Herun 王鹤润, Luo Zheng罗正 | iQiyi
